groups.theme: Cost-sensitive users blocked by paywalls and unclear premium value
example_reviews: Puts results behind a paywall after using for 14 days, thus making it useless
I wish there were more free things on this app such as the exercises, and reading material, bc I found it to be very helpful yet I don't have the $ to pay anything.
groups.notes: Refined automated group A1 by keeping only A1 reviews about paywalls, premium access, affordability, and free-versus-paid value. Removed unrelated praise, login issues, and general support comments.

groups.theme: Routine-based users who depend on reminders and flexible check-in timing
example_reviews: not getting notifications to answer the questions
Overall I like this app. It has helped me a bit to understand what I'm feeling. However the notification to write down how I feel and answer the questions rarely comes.
groups.notes: Refined automated group A2 by keeping A2 reviews about reminders, question cadence, repeated prompts, and check-in routine fit. Removed unrelated subscription complaints and generic praise.

groups.theme: Frequent mood trackers who want clear history and reflective logging
example_reviews: I've been using this app for about 5 weeks and this is the first time I've successfully kept up with something like this. It's been very helpful to track my mood and I like that I can go back and read my entries.
Amazing app! I love to keep track of my feelings with the daily check ins, the graphs, and the stats.
groups.notes: Refined automated group A3 by keeping A3 reviews centered on mood logging, journaling, history, and pattern tracking. Removed reviews whose main point was pricing or reminder complaints.

groups.theme: Users who value emotional reflection, validation, and supportive insights
example_reviews: This app has really helped put into words how I am feeling. The periodic check ins throughout the day have become something I look forward to.
This app was like a diary, it tracks what I feel. I feel more validated when I write my feelings here.
groups.notes: Refined automated group A4 by keeping A4 reviews about emotional reflection, feeling understood, helpful insights, and feeling cared for. Removed unrelated pricing and notification complaints.

groups.theme: Users who rely on reports, resources, and professional-support guidance
example_reviews: I've been using this app since 2018. You answer a few questions 3 times per day for 2 weeks, and at the end it gives you a printable report. It's been very helpful to track my emotional state and report to my mental health team.

This app helped me understand my symptoms and patterns, making it easier to navigate my mental health day to day. I used the notes from the app to guide discussions, and my doctor even said it made working with me easier.
groups.notes: Refined automated group A5 by keeping A5 reviews about reports, mental-health summaries, support resources, and app use alongside professional care. Removed broad praise that did not mention reporting or guidance value.
